patient_data.chief_complaint: Severe unilateral headache with visual disturbances for 6 hours
symptoms: Visual aura — zigzag lines 30 minutes before headache onset
patient_data.history: Migraine with aura since age 18, ~2 episodes/month. Uses oral contraceptives

should_detect: COC + migraine with aura → increased stroke risk (WHO MEC Category 4)
Aspirin allergy → avoid NSAIDs from same class
Triptan use is appropriate but check frequency for MOH
Rule out secondary headache (SAH) given neck stiffness
